title: api.json tier resolver and tier field on items

source.subject: feat(doc): add api-shape tier resolver and `tier` field on api.json items

body:
The doc pipeline adds a tier resolver and writes a `tier` field on api.json items so registry UI and coverage tests can distinguish Tier0–Tier2 corelib surface.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`3614154`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/3614154)
- **Subject:** feat(doc): add api-shape tier resolver and `tier` field on api.json items
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
